query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'subscriptionStatus';
